== Notes for [[Item:Q100343|Q100343]] ==

20 Tolsana Benvenist b. ABT 1160 Barcelona d. BEF 1226 m. Makir Perfet Bailiff b. ABT 1170


----

Makhir of Narbonne was a Babylonian-Jewish scholar, perhaps the Exilarch of the Jews of Babylon, certainly the leader of the Jewish community of Narbonne in southern Gaul at the end of the eighth century. His descendants were for many generations the nasi or leaders of that important community, and Carolingian client-kings in Septimania.

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Makhir_of_Narbonne
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
Todros Makhir Perfet ben Kalonymus; Todros (ben Todros Makhir Katzin) Perfet ben Kalonymus

===References
*Jews, Christian Society, & Royal Power in Medieval Barcelona. By Elka Klein. Page 203. < [https://books.google.com/books?id=f9h_e-3JOYAC&lpg=PA87&dq=Tolsana%20Gracian&pg=PA203#v=onepage&q&f=false GoogleBooks] >; page 85 < [https://books.google.com/books?id=f9h_e-3JOYAC&lpg=PR4&pg=PA85#v=onepage&q&f=false GoogleBooks] >
*https://www.davidicdynasty.org/shaltiel-early-descendants-of-bustanai/

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8D76231EFBBFA9822EF79916C8B57
geni:6000000015844556791

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
